title: Epigenomics and Single-Cell Sequencing Define a Developmental Hierarchy in Langerhans Cell Histiocytosis.
author: Halbritter F Farlik M Schwentner R Jug G Fortelny N Schnoller T Pisa H Schuster LC Reinprecht A Czech T Gojo J Holter W Minkov M Bauer WM Simonitsch-Klupp I Bock C Hutter C
content: S-EPMC6795548 PMC6795548 Epigenomics and Single-Cell Sequencing Define a Developmental Hierarchy in Langerhans Cell Histiocytosis. Langerhans cell histiocytosis (LCH) is a rare neoplasm predominantly affecting children. It occupies a hybrid position between cancers and inflammatory diseases, which
